issue: Database connection timeout errors during traffic spike
root_cause: Database connection pool exhausted due to insufficient idle connections being kept alive.
resolution: Increased minimum connection pool size and configured max_connections to 200 in PostgreSQL config.

issue: API Gateway responding with 502 Bad Gateway
root_cause: Nginx proxy timeout resolving backend upstream containers that were scaling out.
resolution: Increased proxy_read_timeout to 60s and implemented a readiness probe delay.

issue: High memory consumption on Node.js auth service
root_cause: Memory leak caused by unhandled event listeners in the JWT signing library.
resolution: Patched the JWT library to the latest stable version and implemented standard cleanup for event listeners.

issue: Frontend assets failing to load with 404
root_cause: CDN edge locations caching an old deployment manifest preventing new asset resolutions.
resolution: Triggered a hard cache invalidation across all CDN edge nodes and updated CI to append hash to filenames.

issue: Redis cache stampede causing DB overload
root_cause: Multiple concurrent workers attempting to regenerate the same expired cache key simultaneously.
resolution: Implemented a mutex lock for cache regeneration and added staggered cache expiration times.
